angles: NeuroLink extracted from Juspay's real production systems — unlike academic frameworks, battle-tested at fintech enterprise scale processing billions of transactions
The 'one SDK to rule them all' angle: Switch LLM providers with a single parameter change — zero code refactoring required, true portability
MCP-native by design: NeuroLink integrates Model Context Protocol natively with 58+ tool servers, ahead of frameworks that bolted on MCP as an afterthought
TypeScript-first in a Python-dominated space: NeuroLink bets on TypeScript for enterprise AI, offering type safety that Python-based LiteLLM cannot match
Cost optimization built-in: Intelligent routing and automatic provider failover prevent the 30-40% token spend inflation seen without middleware
Early-stage opportunity: With ~85 GitHub stars vs LangChain's tens of thousands, NeuroLink is relatively unknown — early adopters can gain ecosystem advantages
Enterprise HITL (Human-in-the-Loop) support built-in is a rare differentiator vs LangChain and Vercel AI SDK which require custom implementation
Multimodal streaming across 50+ file types (images, CSV, PDF, Office) from single generate() call — reducing integration complexity significantly
